name: atlas
description: Remember ideas, resume interrupted work, and manage local Atlas memory directly from Codex conversations.

interface.shortDescription: Conversation-first memory and action for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Atlas turns explicit requests in Codex conversations into reviewable local memories and actions. Remember ideas, resume interrupted work, see today's focus, search sourced evidence, and update open loops without paid APIs or cloud hosting. The Web dashboard remains an optional workspace for batch review and settings.
defaultPrompt: What unfinished work should I resume?
Search Atlas for my earlier decision and include its source.
